Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR#5229, 415.828.1919 peggytsujimoto@gmail.com.

Hearing held (See Reporter's transcript for full details). Mr. Alkana contests the tentative ruling but states that if it is adopted that the Defenant has twenty days to post the bond. Mr. Deutsche objects and wants the bond posted witin seven days. The requested bond amount is $1,157, 593.85.

Off Calendar Dec-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SILVER CINEMAS ACQUISITION CO. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint states a cause of action and is not uncertain. The inclusion of the unusual demand for replenishment of the security deposit, while not supported by any authority, does not render the complaint defective. Defendant did not move to strike the improper/irrelevant allegations and prayer
